title: Jacobs Increases Quarterly Dividend
text: DALLAS, Jan. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Jacobs (NYSE:J) has declared a quarterly cash dividend payable to shareholders in the amount of $0.23 per share of Jacobs common stock, an increase of 10% from its previous quarterly dividend of $0.21. This dividend will be paid on March 25, 2022, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on Feb. 25, 2022.

title: Jacobs Engineering (J) Moves 3.3% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
text: Jacobs Engineering (J) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

title: Jacobs (J) Wins Project Management Deal From Johns Hopkins
text: Jacobs Engineering Group (J) is set to offer project management services in medical and R&D center campuses.

title: Jacobs to Hold Its Fiscal First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
text: DALLAS, Jan. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jacobs (NYSE:J) plans to release its fiscal first quarter 2022 earnings results before market open on Tuesday, Feb. 8, 2022, and will host a conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET, during which management will make a presentation focusing on the company's results and operating trends.

title: Jacobs Bags Project Management Contract From Johns Hopkins Medicine
text: Johns Hopkins Medicine has selected Jacobs Engineering Group Inc (NYSE: J) to provide project management services to redevelop laboratory space on its medical campus in Baltimore, Maryland. Financial terms were not disclosed.

title: Jacobs (J) Set to Construct Spaceport Facility in Houston
text: With the latest contract win, Jacobs Engineering Group (J) is set to provide integrated solutions to speed up the future of commercial space operations.

title: Jacobs Awarded Project Management Contract with Johns Hopkins Medicine
text: DALLAS, Jan. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jacobs (NYSE:J) was selected by Johns Hopkins Medicine to provide project management services for the redevelopment of laboratory space on its medical campus in Baltimore, Maryland.  Plans are to renovate The Johns Hopkins Hospital's existing Children's Medical and Surgical Center (CMSC) and construct a new 12-story North Tower addition.

title: Jacobs Secures Commercial Space Headquarters Campus Contract
text: Jacobs Engineering Group Inc (NYSE: J) has secured the architecture and engineering phase one design contract from Axiom Space. Financial terms were not disclosed.

title: Jacobs Awarded Commercial Space Headquarters Campus Contract
text: DALLAS, Jan. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jacobs (NYSE:J) has been awarded the architecture and engineering phase one design contract by Axiom Space for the Assembly, Integration and Testing facility planned for the 400-acre Houston Spaceport in the heart of Space City at Ellington Airport. This new 100,000 sq ft facility will support Axiom Space's mission to provide access to low Earth orbit and assemble the first commercial international space station.

title: 5 ‘Strong Buy' Stocks With Dividends Expected to Be Raised This Week
text: After years of a low interest rate environment, many investors have turned to equities not only for the growth potential but also for solid and dependable dividends, which help to provide an income stream.

title: C5 Acquisition Corporation Announces Pricing of $250 Million Initial Public Offering
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--C5 Acquisition Corporation (the “Company”), a special purpose acquisition company, announced the pricing of its initial public offering (“IPO”) of 25,000,000 units at a price of $10.00 per unit. The units will be listed on the New York Stock Exchange (“NYSE”) and will trade under the ticker symbol “CXAC.U” beginning January 7, 2022.
